payload.description: ANALYST proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001: verify smoke validation report committed by CLOUD_CODE at commit 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9. Verification must confirm: (1) governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json exists on main branch with pass status for all five validation checks; (2) auditor-runner.yml contains both the dispatch role filter (from commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5) and the server-side current_task.json update step gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED (from commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae); (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml exists with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing (from commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26); (4) governance/ledger/ contains ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with referenced commit SHAs; (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain for P3 tasks. Upon successful verification, ANALYST will emit VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED closing the SMOKE-E2E-0001 loop and confirming autonomous governance infrastructure is operational and ready for the next roadmap phase.
payload.proof_target: governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json present on main branch with all checks passing; ledger entry TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001-VERIFY-0001 with VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED status and schema_version v164 committed to governance/ledger/
